text: I find myself moved by the cultivated sterility of this modern space. Glass partitions and bright emergency signage evoke a sense of order and possibility, yet the contrast between the rawness of being and the calculated human design prompts a certain restlessness in my soul. As I approach the exhibit labeled 'R+D', the marriage of research and development, I'm compelled to contemplate the tension between the known and the unknown, innovation and tradition. I feel the unspoken anticipation of discovery, buffered always by the boundaries of safety and curation. I wonder — can true insight emerge without risk?
